# @codenhub/i18n

> Experimental runtime-neutral translations with consumer-provided loading,
> deterministic fallback, and optional browser and locale-path integrations.

Use only the root, `/browser`, and `/routing` entrypoints. Await successful core
initialization, keep concurrent server/build instances isolated, and treat
version `0.1.0` as breaking from `0.0.1`.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Entrypoint selection, core quick
  start, and failure model.
- [Usage across runtimes](docs/examples.md): Browser, routed hydration, SSR,
  SSG, and loader examples.
- [API reference](docs/reference.md): Complete exports, defaults, behavior,
  events, routing constraints, and observable errors.
- [Migration from 0.0.1](docs/migrating-from-0.0.1.md): Required API and
  behavior changes for existing consumers.
